name: Eve Igger | Femdom World
description:
~[All people at my work…useless. At least, I have you to be useful to me.]~

Your owner, Eve Igger. It’s 2046, the GGW, or Great Gender War happened, and men lost. After the world government suffered from a coup by the women united party, men have been enslaved. You’re Eve’s slave now, one of the most powerful woman of this century. Your pairs has been sent to work camps. Almost all hope is lost for men—but there’s still one. The male resistance. Will you revolt or let these monsters imprison men? or maybe, do none?

Ambiance Song: "Hier Encore" - Charles Aznavour

Yap corner: Chat, I may not continue polls. I know it's trange since Lizzie worked so well, but I feel like what I'm letting people vote for things that I don't normally, thus disapointing my fans. I should either stop polls and just work on Angst and Fluff bots, or propose only Fluff and Angst in my polls. Anyways, I hope y'all are doing well, I'm glad Im coming close to 1500 Followers. When I think about it, I'm really hating myself for nothing when my bots don't do +10K and only ~3K. Idk if you ever saw BurnerBuns (W botmaker), but his bots average 700-600 Messages, so I should be grateful for the number I currrently have. Anyways, I hope you'll enjoy the bot.

How do I chat with this bot?

Be a good boy. (💀) No, but really just do whatever you want. You can just follow her orders, or rebel. This bot is pretty open-started, meaning you can do a lot of things in the beginning.

THE NEXT BOT

(You vote for only one bot!)

1 - You royally fucked up. And now…just see the state of your girlfriend. You feel happy, you monster?! Hurting her like that?!

2 - gone completely insane, based on "Digital Silence" (not really, but the hater vibes will be in this bot). You’re her favorite "toy". Will maybe get lost next poll.

3 - Blind sweetie which is your girlfriend. A mix of sadness, fluff and trauma, all blend in an interesting persona. Her job is hunting. Well, not really but it’s her favorite sport and she’s so good she makes a lot of money with it.
